producerInput: FOR-387 exported diagnostic metadata; no renderer export extension was required

sourceScope.scopeDescription: The 33 pixels selected by FOR-387 local-window-edge-distance-le-17.

compositionMetadataCandidates.description: Tests whether source alpha already differs from the effective coverage alpha.
Keeps only the high alpha lane while preserving equal source/coverage alpha.
Keeps the oriented coverage sides matching the source-local lane direction.
Keeps pixels whose transparent-source diagnostic carries the blue local source.
Combines source-local blue contribution with the matching oriented coverage side.
compositionMetadataCandidates.selectionMethod: (round-round && blue source && oriented side in {west-terminal,north-west-solid}) || (butt-bevel && blue source && oriented side == north-east-solid && coverageAlphaByte >= 160)

bestCompositionMetadataCandidate.description: Combines source-local blue contribution with the matching oriented coverage side.
bestCompositionMetadataCandidate.selectionMethod: (round-round && blue source && oriented side in {west-terminal,north-west-solid}) || (butt-bevel && blue source && oriented side == north-east-solid && coverageAlphaByte >= 160)

classificationReason: A source/coverage composition metadata candidate recovers all 8 useful pixels inside the FOR-387 scope with 0 included regressions. It is only recorded as a candidate; no correction is enabled.
nextMove: Do not enable the correction in FOR-388. A later ticket may evaluate `source-color-and-oriented-coverage-lane` behind an explicit opt-in guard with full-scene evidence.
